descriptionEn: Name means "may he add." He is the son of Juda or Judah in Luke's genealogy of Jesus Christ. A different Greek text spells Joseph as Josech not to be confused with the father of Jesus Christ or the son of Jacob.

verses.line: Which was the son of Maath, which was the son of Mattathias, which was the son of Semei, which was the son of Joseph, which was the son of Juda,

images.caption: Which was the son of Maath, which was the son of Mattathias, which was the son of Semei, which was the son of Joseph, which was the son of Juda, (Luke 3:26)
